overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through a medieval fantasy village at night. The scene features torch-lit cobblestone streets, timber-framed buildings, and transitions from an elevated walkway down through increasingly narrow alleys and passages.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated village walkway with timber buildings and stone braziers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated cobblestone path, passing villagers and torch-lit braziers

notable_agents.action: villager in red and white clothing walking ahead on the path
villager standing near the stone brazier on the right side

entered.detail: two-story medieval house with exposed wooden beams and lit windows
large circular stone fire pit with bright flames providing illumination
low stone wall running along the right edge of the elevated path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated cobblestone walkway in a medieval village at night. Timber-framed buildings line the left side while a stone retaining wall borders the right. The character walks past villagers and large stone braziers burning with bright flames that cast warm orange light on the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved stone staircase descending to lower village level

events.description: character turns left and begins descending the curved stone staircase
reaches the bottom of the stairs and transitions to the lower cobblestone street

agents.ego_description: turning left and carefully walking down the worn stone steps to the lower village level

notable_agents.action: villager in red cloak descending the stairs just ahead of the character

entered.detail: worn cobblestone steps curving downward between stone walls

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and descends a curved stone staircase, transitioning from the elevated walkway to the lower village level. The stone walls enclose the stairway, and a villager in red clothing walks ahead. At the bottom, the scene opens to a lower street with different buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower village street with mixed stone and timber architecture

events.description: character turns right around a corner, changing direction along the street

agents.ego_description: walking through the lower village streets, passing between stone and timber buildings

entered.detail: solid stone facade building with small lit windows
small wooden house with steeply pitched roof

segments.scene_description: Walking along the lower cobblestone streets, the character moves between mixed architecture of stone buildings and timber houses. The path is illuminated by torchlight, and the character navigates a right turn around a corner, continuing through the village.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow winding path between high stone walls and timber structures

events.description: entering narrow alleyway between high stone wall and timber buildings
turning left along the stone wall into a darker passage

agents.ego_description: navigating the increasingly narrow passages, turning corners between stone walls

entered.detail: tall moss-covered stone retaining wall running alongside the path
large tree with branches extending over the narrow path

segments.scene_description: The environment becomes more enclosed as the character enters a narrow alley between a high stone wall and timber buildings. The lighting grows dimmer, and the path winds between the structures. Large tree branches overhang from the left as the character turns along the stone wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: tight canyon-like passage between natural rock face and timber structure

events.description: entering very narrow passage between rock cliff and wooden building

agents.ego_description: walking carefully through the tight alley with rock wall on left and timber building on right

entered.detail: tall natural rock wall with rough texture forming the left boundary
wooden building facade with green window frames and overhanging upper floor

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place in a very narrow passage resembling a small canyon, with a natural rock cliff face on the left and a timber structure with green windows on the right. The path is tight and sheltered, with distant light visible at the end of the alley as the character continues forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a medieval village at night, transitioning from an open, elevated walkway into increasingly narrow and enclosed passages. It begins on a cobblestone path lined with timber-framed buildings and bright stone braziers that cast a warm orange glow over the surroundings. As the character turns left, the scene descends a curved stone staircase, shifting from the high walkway down to a lower street characterized by a mix of stone and timber architecture illuminated by torchlight. The environment then grows more confined as the camera navigates a right turn into a dim alleyway where high stone walls and overhanging tree branches close in around the path. Finally, the scene tightens into a narrow, canyon-like passage between a natural rock cliff and a timber structure, moving toward a distant light at the end of the sheltered corridor.
